godot_hook_investigation.note: Investigation record; external/godot-master is NOT modified (the Godot side is only ever changed through the tracked patch stack). The patch 0023 call-site gate, the patch 0024 native-handle mapping, and the patch 0025 recording-smoke/real-pass opt-in arms have since landed on top of these recorded paths/functions, and the gated real-pass enablement smoke measured a strict success on the 0001..0026 scratch build (see implementation_status.real_pass_measured_success).

builder_class.native_pass_shape: compute merge segment of bake_cluster ("Pack 3D Cluster Elements"): one thread per cluster (local_size 8x8), reads cluster_render_buffer (set0 binding1) + element_buffer (set0 binding3), writes cluster_buffer (set0 binding2); preceded by the NON-replaceable rasterization segment (cluster_render.glsl proxy-mesh draw) that produces cluster_render_buffer, and by native buffer_clear of both output buffers; dispatch only when render_element_count > 0

godot_hook_investigation.shader_note: cluster_data_inc.glsl declares three layout macros that are zero-reference historical leftovers; they do not describe the cluster_buffer layout and are not used by this pass.

call_sites.note: push constants assembled L522-531; compute_list_dispatch_threads(cluster_screen_size.x, cluster_screen_size.y, 1) at L535. Driven per-frame by render_forward_clustered.cpp L1650 (current_cluster_builder->bake_cluster()); builder configured at render_forward_clustered.cpp L158 via ClusterBuilderRD::setup (max elements default 512 from rendering/limits/cluster_builder/max_clustered_elements, 32-aligned).

source_resources: cluster_render_buffer (uint[] SSBO, set0 binding1; per cluster: usage bitmap words then per-element z_range words; produced by the raster segment; cluster_builder_rd.cpp setup L307)
element_buffer (RenderElementData[] SSBO, 80 bytes/element, set0 binding3; store segment reads only type/touches_near/touches_far/original_index; cluster_builder_rd.cpp setup L313)
godot_hook_investigation.dest_resource: cluster_buffer (uint[] SSBO, set0 binding2; per (cluster,type) block = [existence bitmap max_cluster_element_count_div_32 words][32 Z-slice (min u16 | (max+1) u16) words]; zero-cleared natively each frame; cluster_builder_rd.cpp setup L308)

descriptor_mapping.requires_64bit_integer_shader_capability: cluster_store carries no i64 push-constant fields (all 8 dwords are u32), so SHADER_INT64 is NOT part of its binding preflight (same as GRX-013 particles_copy; contrast with the GRX-009/010/011/012 texture passes)

supported_math_subset.variant: the complete cluster_store.glsl store-segment math; single kernel, no mode/variant switches, so no subset cut
supported_math_subset.scan: outer while over render_element_count_div_32 usage words; inner findLSB (firstbitlow) per-bit iteration with bits &= ~(1 << index_bit)
supported_math_subset.z_range: from_z = findLSB(z_range), to_z = findMSB(z_range) + 1; touches_near -> from_z = 0; touches_far -> to_z = 32; z_range == 0 guard skips the element
supported_math_subset.slice_write: per slice: minmax = dst[slice_ofs]; if 0 -> 0xFFFF; elem_min = min(orig_index, minmax & 0xFFFF); elem_max = max(orig_index + 1, minmax >> 16); dst[slice_ofs] = elem_min | (elem_max << 16)
supported_math_subset.threading: one thread per cluster; every write lands in the owning cluster's (cluster,type) blocks, so no atomics are needed (mirrors the native shader)
supported_math_subset.parameterization: all sizes/counts come from the 8-dword b0; nothing is hardcoded (the Godot default max_clustered_elements = 512 is a deployment default only, documented as a known assumption)

known_gaps: the bake_cluster rasterization segment (cluster_render.glsl proxy-mesh draw over sphere/cone/box geometry, incl. MSAA/attachment pipeline variants) is NOT replaced: it is a graphics pipeline that produces this kernel's cluster_render_buffer input and stays native permanently
the native buffer_clear of cluster_buffer / cluster_render_buffer stays native; the kernel assumes a zeroed destination exactly like the native shader
the render_element_count == 0 early-out stays native (no store dispatch happens in that frame)

the patch 0025 result writeback is a SCAFFOLD: the shim submit executes outside Godot's frame command order (before the frame's buffer_clear) and the native Godot cluster store dispatch re-packs the whole cluster table every frame as the continuation/backstop, so the opt-in Rurix dispatch has no measured net benefit yet (in-frame command-order integration is not designed)

synthetic parity fixtures use small cluster grids and 32-aligned element capacities; the Godot default max_clustered_elements = 512 deployment scale is a documented assumption, not exercised at full scale offline
GPU-observed math parity beyond the standalone S6 dispatch smoke (in-engine observation is the later enablement slice)

compile_blockers.summary: the canonical cluster_store package is the owner-approved hlsl_bridge_workaround artifact (DXC cs_6_0 container validated by dxv, per-slot structured_buffer/structured_buffer/rwstructured_buffer binding kinds, Rurix-owned RTS0). cluster_store is an all raw-buffer / SSBO pass, so the GRX-009 texture-intrinsic llc blocker does NOT apply; the workaround is used because of three rurixc blockers: (1) the DXIL compute-body lowering accepts only View<global, f32>/ViewMut<global, f32> buffer views (src/rurixc/src/dxil_codegen.rs L1754/L1786) while all three cluster_store buffers are u32-word SSBOs whose bit patterns an f32 view cannot carry bit-faithfully; (2) the integer bit operations the kernel is built from (&, |, ~, <<, >>) exist in MIR (BinOp::BitAnd/BitOr/BitXor/Shl/Shr, src/rurixc/src/mir.rs L643-647) but have no DXIL-backend lowering; (3) the Rurix lang subset has no findLSB/findMSB (firstbitlow/firstbithigh) intrinsic on any backend

implementation_status.runtime_state_note: The DEFAULT runtime path stays fallback-only: under the default Godot config the bridge returns RXGD_STATUS_FALLBACK for RXGD_PASS_CLUSTER_STORE on every call (manual_disabled on a valid default binding) and the native cluster store renders. real_gpu_pass=true records the OPT-IN MEASURED arm only: with the default-false dispatch_real_pass opt-in explicitly enabled AND a d3d12-recording-shim bridge DLL, the gated real cluster_store dispatch executed and completed on real hardware (real_pass_enablement_success_evidence.json strict_success=true). The shipping feature-off bridge still fails closed with real_dispatch_path_not_linked. The gate also REMOVES the historical placeholder estimated-timing path for RXGD_PASS_CLUSTER_STORE: no estimated cluster_store GPU time is attributed any more.
implementation_status.bridge_gate: src/rurix-godot ClusterStoreGate: preflight (3 structured-buffer resources in cluster_render/render_elements/cluster_store order, 32-byte b0 ClusterStore::PushConstant mirror, nonzero cluster_screen_size dwords 2-3 and nonzero render_element_count_div_32 dword 4, nonzero buffer byte sizes; NO int64 cap check because cluster_store's b0 carries no i64 fields) -> dispatch eligibility (RXGD_CAP_CLUSTER_STORE_REAL_PASS opt-in, the int64 device/recording-harness capability, non-null native handles, ClusterStoreDispatchPackage layout/digest match vs offline evidence) -> per-slot kernel-binding-kind conformance ([structured_buffer, structured_buffer, rwstructured_buffer]) -> math-parity gate (cluster_store_cpu_reference_proven_pending_gpu_dispatch) -> real dispatch only under the d3d12-recording-shim feature via the additive 3-buffer shim entry rxgd_cluster_store_record_dispatch (Wave 4 production/instrumented readback selector + engagement note() counters); every failure records a fallback reason and prints the once-per-session RXGD_CLUSTER_STORE_REAL_PASS_BLOCKED diagnostic. Because int64 is NOT in the preflight, a forced capability downgrade fails closed at dispatch_eligibility_failed (the GRX-013 precedent).
implementation_status.godot_module_patch: spike/godot-rurix/patches/0023-rurix-accel-cluster-store-pass-gate-and-callsite.patch (stacked on 0001..0022; default-false rendering/rurix_accel/passes/cluster_store/enabled setting, try_record_cluster_store() module gate, default-false virtual D3D12Hooks::try_record_cluster_store(), and the bake_cluster store-segment call-site opt-in gate in cluster_builder_rd.cpp; the native store dispatch is always preserved as fallback/continuation). The runtime native-handle binding is patch 0024-rurix-accel-cluster-store-runtime-resource-binding.patch (three structured buffers via get_driver_resource(DRIVER_RESOURCE_BUFFER, ...), Rurix slot order cluster_render/render_elements/cluster_store, 32-byte b0 mirror) and the recording-smoke + real-pass opt-in arms are patch 0025-rurix-accel-cluster-store-recording-smoke-and-real-pass-optin.patch (authored under the GRX Wave 4 print-gating discipline: every per-dispatch stdout marker is gated under the harness-only dispatch_recording_smoke opt-in, so the production dispatch_real_pass path emits zero per-dispatch stdout). PATCH_ALLOCATION.md section 1 records 0023-0025 in use.

real_pass_measured_success.real_gpu_pass_scope: opt_in_only: the measured real dispatch requires the default-false dispatch_real_pass arm plus a d3d12-recording-shim bridge DLL; the default runtime path stays fallback-only and the shipping feature-off bridge fails closed with real_dispatch_path_not_linked
real_pass_measured_success.pass_enable_matrix: three legs measured on the 0001..0026 scratch build: disabled_default (reference) / enabled_real_pass_optin (candidate, real_pass_marker + writeback_marker + record_marker observed under the Wave 4 recording-smoke instrumentation arm) / forced_capability_downgrade (RXGD_CLUSTER_STORE_REAL_PASS_BLOCKED first_missing_prerequisite=dispatch_eligibility_failed fallback_reason=unsupported_device)
real_pass_measured_success.scene: deterministic clustered-lights scene (5x5 static lit box grid + nine static shadowless OmniLight3D so render_element_count > 0 every frame; ClusterBuilderRD::bake_cluster() drives the store compute merge dispatch each frame; three structured buffers cluster_render SRV t0 + render_elements SRV t1 + cluster_store UAV u0 with the 32-byte ClusterStore::PushConstant b0 mirror)
real_pass_measured_success.ldr_visual_gate: max_abs=0 / mean_abs=0 (candidate is bit-exact to the reference because the writeback is a scaffold: the shim submit lands before the frame's buffer_clear and the native cluster store dispatch re-packs the whole table)

standalone_d3d12_dispatch_smoke.purpose: Prove the tracked offline cluster_store DXIL container + RTS0 root signature + descriptor layout can complete one minimal compute dispatch on a real D3D12 device/command queue with three structured buffers (SRV t0 + SRV t1 + UAV u0) AND that every measured GPU output word matches the CPU integer reference exactly (zero tolerance) on the deterministic synthetic cluster_render/element fixtures. Standalone measured evidence only; the bridge records no dispatch and returns no OK.
does_not_imply: any visual diff, measured fallback telemetry, or performance claim

remaining_segments: native-continuation retirement / net-benefit measurement (the patch 0025 writeback is a scaffold; in-frame command-order integration into Godot's own compute list is not designed)
in-engine GPU math parity observation beyond the standalone S6 dispatch smoke (math_parity_evidence.json stays status=pending_gpu_dispatch)
per-pass FPS baseline comparison (contract requires >= 0.95x baseline before any default-enable discussion)

rd_native.summary: GRX Route B cluster_store rd_native turns GRX-014 from the patch 0025 SCAFFOLD (native continuation/backstop) into a genuine in-frame real replacement. It drives the main RenderingDevice directly, recording the Rurix cluster_store kernel ONTO THE ALREADY-OPEN bake_cluster store compute list (naturally same-list, the cleanest of the batch); when it records, the native cluster_store dispatch is GENUINELY SKIPPED (one fewer native dispatch). Bridge-independent; the shim RXGD_CAP_CLUSTER_STORE_REAL_PASS bit 8 is unrelated.

backend_states.1: shim (nominal; existing shim path governed by its own four settings)
backend_states.2: rd_native (engage the in-frame RD-native cluster store replacement)

rd_native.hook_virtual: D3D12Hooks::try_record_cluster_store_rd_native(int64_t p_compute_list, RID p_cluster_render, RID p_render_elements, RID p_cluster_store, Size2i p_screen_size, const uint8_t *p_push_constants, uint32_t p_push_constant_bytes)
rd_native.descriptor_mapping: three STRUCTURED buffers bound as UNIFORM_TYPE_STORAGE_BUFFER in the Rurix container binding order (cluster_render=t0 SRV, render_elements=t1 SRV, cluster_store=u0 UAV) mapping Godot members cluster_render_buffer/element_buffer/cluster_buffer (Godot native set-0 binding numbers 1/3/2 are a different order), 32-byte ClusterStore::PushConstant b0, compute_list_dispatch_threads(screen.x,screen.y,1) over the container 8x8 local size.
rd_native.kernel_subset: the compute merge (store/pack) segment only; the preceding cluster_render raster segment, the buffer clears, and the render_element_count==0 early-out stay native permanently.

enablement.status_note: The 0044 patch is authored, LF-clean, and stacked-applyable on 0001-0029+0040-0045 (--check-only PASS). This is the GRX-014 scaffold->real-replacement milestone at the patch level; the strict-success-vs-measured-blocked outcome is determined by the enablement smoke on the freshly-built scratch Godot (clustered-lights scene; downstream visible-frame LDR diff). No real_gpu_pass is claimed until that measured run lands.

remaining_rounds: run the enablement smoke on the built scratch exe (clustered OmniLight scene)
GPU math parity characterization of the packed cluster table vs native

evidence_requirements.offline_compile: offline_compile_evidence.json (measured): DXC cs_6_0 compile + DXV validation pass + Rurix-owned RTS0 + descriptor layout; three artifact SHA-256 recomputable on disk
evidence_requirements.math_parity: math_parity_evidence.json: deterministic synthetic cluster_render/element fixtures with an integer-exact CPU reference (pure u32 word math, no float tolerance) covering touches_near/touches_far, single- and multi-slice z ranges, the minmax==0 -> 0xFFFF initialization branch, same-slice min/max merging, the z_range==0 guard, empty clusters, and the existence bitmap; status=pending_gpu_dispatch
evidence_requirements.visual: later enablement slice (in-engine LDR absolute diff on the pinned thresholds); this slice claims none
evidence_requirements.perf: reuse GRX-006 baseline/perf gate; no perf improvement claimed

disclaimer: GRX-014 cluster_store is closed out at the GRX-013 stage-A5-equivalent level: contract trio + DXC/DXV/RTS0 offline kernel package (hlsl_bridge_workaround provenance, Rurix-owned RTS0) + integer-exact CPU math-parity reference + fail-closed bridge ClusterStoreGate + Godot patches 0023-0025 + standalone real D3D12 dispatch smoke + gated real-pass enablement strict MEASURED success + owner keep_default_disabled decision. real_gpu_pass=true / real_d3d12_dispatch_recorded=true record the OPT-IN MEASURED arm only: default_enable_state stays disabled, the default runtime path stays fallback-only (the shipping feature-off bridge fails closed with real_dispatch_path_not_linked), the patch 0025 writeback is a scaffold with the native cluster store as continuation/backstop, the rasterization segment stays native permanently, and NO visual-superiority, GPU-timestamp, FPS, or performance improvement is claimed.
